# katapult_object_storage_access_key (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the access key.
- `region` (String) The region of the object storage cluster.

### Optional

- `all_buckets_read` (Boolean) Allow this key to list all buckets.
- `all_objects_read` (Boolean) Allow this key to read objects across all buckets.
- `all_objects_write` (Boolean) Allow this key to write objects across all buckets.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the access key.
- `read_buckets` (Set of String) Buckets this key has read access to. Managed via the bucket resource's read_key_ids.
- `s3_access_key_id` (String) The S3 access key ID.
- `s3_secret_access_key` (String, Sensitive) The S3 secret access key. Only available at creation time; empty after import.
- `server_url` (String) The S3 server URL.
- `write_buckets` (Set of String) Buckets this key has write access to. Managed via the bucket resource's write_key_ids.
